title: Genome Assembly of Fusarium avenaceum
author: Christopher Gottshcalk
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Here, we present a complete genome assembly for  Fusarium avenaceum  and associated annotation using long-read sequencing generated from the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT;London, UK) platform for both DNA and RNA obtained from fruit-sampled cultures.
steps_raw: Here, we present a complete genome assembly for  Fusarium avenaceum  and associated annotation using long-read sequencing generated from the Oxford Nanopore Technologies (ONT;London, UK) platform for both DNA and RNA obtained from fruit-sampled cultures.
